options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Did addition before multiplication: (18÷6+4)×7 = 49. BODMAS requires multiplication before addition.
options.trap_reason_hi: Multiplication से पहले addition किया: (18÷6+4)×7 = 49। BODMAS में multiplication पहले है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Grouped denominator wrongly as 6+4. The expression has separate division and multiplication operations.
options.trap_reason_hi: Denominator को 6+4 group कर दिया। Expression में division और multiplication अलग operations हैं।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Changed multiplication 4×7 into addition 4+7.
options.trap_reason_hi: Multiplication 4×7 को addition 4+7 बना दिया।

questions.explanation_method_en: First divide and multiply: 18÷6=3, 4×7=28. Add: 3+28=31. Therefore, answer = 31.
questions.explanation_concept_en: BODMAS fixes operation order. Division and multiplication are handled before addition, moving left-to-right among same-priority operations. Final answer is 31.
questions.explanation_method_hi: पहले divide और multiply: 18÷6=3, 4×7=28। Add करें: 3+28=31। अतः answer = 31।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: BODMAS operation order तय करता है। Division और multiplication addition से पहले होते हैं। Final answer 31 है।
